title: isodon longitubus
intro: Isodon longitubus, also known as Chinese sage or Dan Shen Ye, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Isodon longitubus include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Isodon longitubus can be prepared as an herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
